# Extracao: INFO

- **Fonte:** INFO.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

This practical and actionable training series for the SI coach focuses on four of the most common coaching requests. You will get fast, effective strategies for working with clients overcoming: anxiety, parenting challenges, workplace dynamics, and taking action. This series is taught by SI cofounders and master teachers Mark and Magali Peysha.
 
During these classes you will learn what strategies you can use to help a client in these four key areas. We are very excited to spend focused time with you around these important and commonly requested coaching topics. We want to hear what situations, questions and challenges have been presented to you regarding these subjects.
